overall.description: A first-person walk through a coastal city beach at sunset in GTA V, starting from a parking lot promenade, crossing the sandy beach past a lifeguard tower and colorful umbrellas, and wading into the ocean as dramatic clouds glow orange and pink above the water.

events.description: ground transitions from asphalt parking lot to sandy beach

agents.ego_description: walking along the concrete promenade beside a parking lot with palm trees visible ahead

entered.detail: weathered yellow barrier with peeling paint running along the right side of the path
large paved parking area with a few parked cars and street lamps
tall palm trees silhouetted against the sunset sky
tall modern street lamps along the parking lot edge
multi-story white apartment complex visible in the distance
large amusement park Ferris wheel silhouetted against the sunset clouds

segments.scene_description: Walking along a concrete promenade at golden hour, with a yellow barrier on the right and a parking lot on the left. Palm trees and distant buildings frame the view against a dramatic orange and purple sunset sky. The ground transitions from asphalt to sand as the beach begins.

agents.ego_description: walking across the dry sand toward a prominent lifeguard tower

entered.detail: white multi-level lifeguard station with observation deck and red flag
utility poles with wires stretching across the beach scene
single colorful beach umbrella visible in the distance
calm ocean water meeting the horizon under the sunset sky

segments.scene_description: Moving onto the sandy beach and approaching a prominent lifeguard tower. Power lines stretch overhead against the colorful sky, and the ocean becomes visible ahead. The beach is empty with warm golden-hour lighting casting long shadows on the sand.

events.description: colorful beach umbrellas and surfboards appear along the right side of the beach

agents.ego_description: walking past beach amenities including colorful umbrellas and surfboards stuck in the sand

entered.detail: two white surfboards planted upright in the sand
vibrant rainbow-colored beach umbrellas and matching inflatable rings
colorful inflatable pool rings scattered on the sand
large mountain range visible in the far distance along the coastline

segments.scene_description: Walking along the beach past recreational amenities including colorful rainbow umbrellas and surfboards planted in the sand. Palm trees now line the right side of the view, and distant mountains become visible along the coastline while approaching the shoreline.

events.description: stepping from wet sand into the shallow ocean water

agents.ego_description: approaching the water's edge and stepping into the shallow surf

entered.detail: gentle ocean waves lapping at the shore with foam
dark wet sand reflecting the sunset colors with tide pools

segments.scene_description: Reaching the shoreline where the dry sand becomes wet and reflective with tide pools. Gentle waves lap at the beach as the camera enters the shallow ocean water, transitioning from the beach to the sea.

agents.ego_description: wading through shallow ocean water parallel to the shoreline

entered.detail: shallow ocean water with visible sandy bottom and gentle currents
coastal buildings and pier structures visible along the distant shore
the amusement park Ferris wheel visible again along the distant shoreline

segments.scene_description: Wading through the shallow ocean water with gentle waves moving around. The shoreline with buildings and the distant Ferris wheel are visible to the right, while the open ocean stretches ahead under the dramatic sunset sky with pink and orange clouds.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a concrete urban promenade across a wide sandy beach and into the shallow ocean under a dramatic sunset. It begins along a paved walkway bordered by a yellow barrier and a parking lot, moving forward as the asphalt transitions into soft sand beneath a purple and orange sky. As the camera advances across the empty beach, it passes a lifeguard tower and power lines before gliding past colorful rainbow umbrellas and surfboards planted near a line of palm trees. The scene then shifts toward the coastline, where the dry sand becomes wet and reflective with tide pools just before the camera enters the gentle surf. Finally, the movement continues deep into the shallow water, leaving the distant city buildings and a Ferris wheel behind to face the open ocean under glowing pink and orange clouds.
